mapper.select: SELECT * FROM questions ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions (title, content, type_id, difficulty, options, correct_answers, correct_answer, tags, status, created_by, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{typeId}, #{difficulty}, #{options}, #{correctAnswers}, #{correctAnswer}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE questions title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type_id = #{typeId}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, options = #{options}, correct_answers = #{correctAnswers}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM questions WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')

SELECT * FROM questions
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR tags LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
AND type_id = (SELECT id FROM question_types WHERE name = #{type}) AND difficulty = #{difficulty} AND status = 1
SELECT qt.name as type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM questions q JOIN question_types qt ON q.type_id = qt.id WHERE q.status = 1 GROUP BY qt.name
SELECT difficulty, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM questions WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY difficulty
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions q JOIN question_types qt ON q.type_id = qt.id WHERE qt.name = #{type}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE difficulty = #{difficulty}
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE tags LIKE CONCAT('%',#{tag},'%') AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM questions WHERE title = #{title}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM questions WHERE title = #{title} AND id != #{id}
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY id ASC
